DMJ.App.Title: Game Master's Journal
DMJ.App.Intro: Prepare upcoming adventures using private Foundry journal pages.
DMJ.Settings.Open.Name: Game Master's Journal
DMJ.Settings.Open.Label: Open journal
DMJ.Settings.Open.Hint: Open this world's adventure preparation dashboard.
DMJ.Settings.SessionView.Name: Adventure view
DMJ.Settings.SessionView.Hint: Stores the card or list view selected in this browser.
DMJ.Diary.Name: Game Master's Journal — {world}
DMJ.Session.SearchPlaceholder: Search by name, status, or date...
DMJ.Session.ContextHint: Click to open or right-click to delete
DMJ.Empty.Title: No adventures prepared
DMJ.Empty.Text: Create the first adventure above. This world's private journal will be created automatically.
DMJ.Error.GMOnly: Only a Game Master can change the GM Journal.
DMJ.Planner.Title: Session Planner
DMJ.Placeholder.goal: What must happen for this session to fulfill its purpose?
DMJ.Placeholder.scenes: List possible scenes, triggers, and consequences. A strict order is not required.
DMJ.Board.Title: Session Outline
DMJ.Board.ActionError: This action could not be completed in the session outline.
DMJ.Board.KanbanHelp: Write freely • @ mentions the library • drop an Actor or Item • / inserts content
DMJ.Board.HelpCallout: Highlights dialogue, a clue, or important information.
DMJ.Board.HelpCheck: Creates an item that can be marked as completed.
DMJ.Board.HelpTest: Creates a test; use + to add success, failure, results, or a description.
DMJ.Board.HelpClue: Creates a private clue; drag its marker to place it on the Scene.
DMJ.Board.HelpMention: Mentions a Game Master's Library record.
DMJ.Board.HelpDrop: Drop an Actor or Item over text to mention it, or over Scene links to relate it.
DMJ.Board.Help: Drag the background to pan • Use the wheel to zoom
DMJ.Board.ResizeColumn: Resize column from the right edge
DMJ.Board.ResizeColumnHeight: Resize column from the bottom edge
DMJ.Board.CardHeaderHint: Drag to move • double-click to mark as completed
DMJ.Board.EditorPlaceholder: Write the adventure, type / for commands, or @ to mention...
DMJ.Board.MentionMenu: Mention a Game Master's Library record
DMJ.Board.MentionMissing: The mentioned record is no longer available.
DMJ.Board.MentionDropError: Drop a valid Foundry Actor or Item.
DMJ.Board.SceneLinkLibraryEmpty: The Game Master's Library is still empty.
DMJ.Board.SceneLinkDropHint: Drop an Actor or Item here, or use + to choose from the Library.
DMJ.Board.SceneLinkNotePlaceholder: Role, clue, or purpose in this scene...
DMJ.Board.SceneLinkDuplicate: This document is already linked to the scene.
DMJ.Board.SceneLinkLimit: This scene has reached the link limit.
DMJ.Board.SceneLinkDropError: Drop a valid Actor, Item, or Game Master's Library record.
DMJ.Board.Command.CalloutHint: Highlights dialogue, a clue, or important information
DMJ.Board.Command.CheckHint: Creates an item that can be marked as completed
DMJ.Board.Command.TestHint: Use /test Name; record consequences or results
DMJ.Board.Command.ClueHint: Creates a private clue that can be dragged onto the Scene
DMJ.Board.CalloutPlaceholder: Write the highlighted dialogue or information...
DMJ.Board.CluePrivate: Visible only to the Game Master
DMJ.Board.ClueDrag: Drag private clue onto the Scene
DMJ.Clue.Placed: Private clue added to the Scene.
DMJ.Clue.Invalid: This clue could not be created on the Scene.
DMJ.Board.TestResultPlaceholder: What happens when this result is reached?
DMJ.Board.TestDescriptionPlaceholder: A note or consequence independent of success and failure...
DMJ.Board.EmptyKanban: Create the first scene to start building the outline.
DMJ.Board.EmptyText: Create a scene and drag its card freely around the board.
DMJ.Resource.Intro: Create people, places, objects, and forces that can return in any session.
DMJ.Resource.CreateKind: What do you want to create?
DMJ.Resource.SelectImageHint: Click to choose an image from Foundry files.
DMJ.Resource.OpenImageHint: Click to view. Right-click to change or adjust the image.
DMJ.Resource.Name: Record name
DMJ.Resource.LinkedMissing: The linked document could not be found.
DMJ.Popout.OpenWorkspace: Open the Journal on another monitor
DMJ.Popout.Unavailable: The PopOut! module is not active.
DMJ.Popout.RenderFirst: Open the window before detaching it with PopOut!.
DMJ.Popout.Error: The Game Master's Journal window could not be detached.
DMJ.Resource.Drop: Drop a Foundry Actor or Item here
DMJ.Resource.DropWorldHint: Drop a world Actor or Item to create a linked record.
DMJ.Resource.DropWorldInvalid: Drop a valid world Actor or Item sheet.
DMJ.Resource.DropWorldCreated: A linked record was created for “{name}”.
DMJ.Resource.DropWorldExisting: The record linked to “{name}” already exists in the Game Master's Library.
DMJ.Resource.EditorPlaceholder: Write or type / for commands and @ to mention...
DMJ.Resource.Saved: Record saved to the Game Master's Library.
DMJ.Resource.DeleteConfirm: Permanently delete “{name}” from the Game Master's Library?
DMJ.Resource.Deleted: Record deleted from the Game Master's Library.
DMJ.Resource.ContextHint: Click to open or right-click to delete
DMJ.Resource.Error.Name: Enter a record name.
DMJ.Resource.Error.Drop: Drop a valid Foundry Actor or Item.
DMJ.Resource.PlaceType.Label: Location type
DMJ.Resource.Faction.Title: Faction structure
DMJ.Resource.Faction.Hint: Organize this organization's leadership, members, goals, and relationships.
DMJ.Resource.Layout.Label: Sheet layout
DMJ.Resource.Layout.editorialHint: Large side image with fields arranged in two columns.
DMJ.Resource.Layout.panoramaHint: Wide featured image with fields in a vertical reading flow.
DMJ.Resource.Layout.compactHint: Smaller header with more fields visible at once.
DMJ.Resource.Layout.sidebarHint: Tall image on the left with all information arranged on the right.
DMJ.CityMap.Title: City map
DMJ.CityMap.Help: Drag the map to pan, use the wheel to zoom, and use location handles to move or resize markers.
DMJ.CityMap.Empty: Select an image to begin the city map.
DMJ.CityMap.ResizeLocation: Drag to resize; click to cycle marker size
DMJ.CityMap.LocationMissing: This location sheet is no longer available.
DMJ.CityMap.LocationDuplicate: This location is already marked on the map.
DMJ.ItemPiles.InactiveHint: Enable Item Piles or Item Piles: Symbaroum to link a merchant.
DMJ.ItemPiles.Error.Unavailable: No compatible Item Piles variant is available.
DMJ.ItemPiles.Error.Conflict: Item Piles and Item Piles: Symbaroum are active at the same time. Enable only one variant in this world.
DMJ.ItemPiles.Error.MerchantCreate: Item Piles did not return a valid merchant. Creation was cancelled.
DMJ.ItemPiles.Error.MerchantMissing: The linked merchant does not exist or is not configured as an Item Piles merchant.
DMJ.ItemPiles.Error.CharacterRequired: Assign a character to this user before purchasing from the shop.
DMJ.ItemPiles.Error.ItemMissing: This item is no longer available from the shop.
DMJ.ItemPiles.Error.CannotBuy: The character lacks the resources or space required for this purchase.
DMJ.ItemPiles.Error.PurchaseFailed: Item Piles did not complete the purchase.
DMJ.PlayerDiary.Name: Players' Journal — {world}
DMJ.PlayerDiary.Title: Players' Journal
DMJ.PlayerDiary.DropWorldHint: Drop an Actor or Item to create and publish a linked record.
DMJ.PlayerDiary.DropWorldCreated: “{name}” was created in the Game Master's Library and published to the Players' Journal.
DMJ.PlayerDiary.DropWorldExisting: The record linked to “{name}” was published to the Players' Journal.
DMJ.PlayerDiary.Tagline: Stories, people, and places discovered by the group
DMJ.PlayerDiary.Feed.Title: Campaign wall
DMJ.PlayerDiary.Feed.Updated: Wiki updated by the Game Master
DMJ.PlayerDiary.EmptyHint: People, places, and stories published by the Game Master will appear here.
DMJ.PlayerDiary.About: This journal contains only what the characters have already discovered during the campaign.
DMJ.PlayerDiary.Publish.Title: Players' Journal
DMJ.PlayerDiary.Publish.Hint: Publish only information the players have already discovered.
DMJ.PlayerDiary.Commerce.Title: Shops
DMJ.PlayerDiary.Commerce.EmptyHint: Shops published by the Game Master will appear here.
DMJ.PlayerDiary.Commerce.ClosedHint: The merchant is not accepting purchases right now.
DMJ.PlayerDiary.Commerce.NoItems: The merchant has no available items.
